Registers the 'pebble-arc-config' library using Phutil.

# Purpose
The PHP code registers a library named `pebble-arc-config` using the `phutil_register_library` function. This file is intended to be part of a larger system where it serves as a configuration or setup file to make the `pebble-arc-config` library available for use in other parts of the application. The registration associates the library with the current file path, enabling the system to locate and utilize the library's resources. This code provides narrow functionality focused on library registration within a PHP application.
